headline: Eli Lilly Stock And The Price Of Confidence
summary: Management lifted its profit outlook, and investors have more than quadrupled that bet. The question now is what they're really paying for.

headline: Ross Stores Inc (NASDAQ:ROST) Shows Strong Uptrend and Accelerating Growth in a High Quality Stock Setup
summary: ROSS STORES (ROST) passes Mark Minervini's Trend Template with strong technical uptrend and accelerating EPS/revenue growth. Stock trades near 52-week high with relative strength of 91.62. Perfect 10/10 technical rating but setup score low—ideal for pullback entries.
